differential_diagnoses: Snakebite envenomation (likely Viperidae) with venom-induced consumption coagulopathy (VICC)
Placental abruption secondary to envenomation-induced coagulopathy
Acute kidney injury secondary to severe envenomation and hypovolemia
next_steps: Initiate fluid resuscitation and blood product transfusion (packed red blood cells, fresh frozen plasma, and platelets)
Perform immediate obstetric evaluation including bedside ultrasound to assess fetal status and placental location
Provide urgent surgical/obstetric consultation for potential emergency cesarean section
Monitor hematologic, renal, and coagulation profiles serially
Remove the tourniquet and perform local wound care following standardized snakebite protocols
Maintain hemodynamic monitoring and prepare for potential need for dialysis
